questions.prompt: Deleting a Huntress Organization is appropriate when the customer is only removing ITDR but keeping EDR agents.
questions.explanation: Organization deletion removes corresponding services tied to that Organization. For module-level exits, remove or unmap the specific integration or service path.

questions.prompt: A customer leaves ITDR, but other customers still use the same Huntress ITDR integration. What is the best action?
choices: Unmap the specific customer's tenant from the integration
Leave the mapping in place until billing month-end
questions.explanation: Unmapping removes the specific tenant from the event stream without breaking other mapped organizations.
